# Sunnyside Decks & Fences

> Family-owned deck and fence builder based in Everett, Washington. Custom decks, premium fencing, pergolas, and complete outdoor living spaces built to handle Pacific Northwest weather. Owner Tim Lapatsin is on-site for every project.

## Entity

- Company: Sunnyside Decks & Fences (formerly Lapatsin, LLC)
- Owner: Tim Lapatsin
- Founded by: Tim Lapatsin
- Industry: Deck and Fence Construction
- Address: 6125 Sycamore Pl, Everett, WA 98203
- Phone: (425) 737-2259
- Email: timlapatsin@yahoo.com
- Website: https://sunnysidedecksfences.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9 AM – 6 PM | Saturday–Sunday Closed
- Service Area: 50-mile radius from Everett, WA — Snohomish County, King County, Skagit County, Island County
- Licensed and insured: Yes
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lapatsin_llc/
- Google Business Profile: https://share.google/DzdjpCErMrTdlOsXm

## Services

- Custom Deck Building — full custom residential deck design and construction
- Composite Decking — Trex, TimberTech, and PVC composite deck installation
- Wood Decking — cedar, redwood, ipe hardwood, pressure-treated lumber
- Deck Railings — cable, aluminum, glass, vinyl, and wood railing systems
- Covered Decks & Pergolas — pergolas, covered patios, gazebos, screened decks
- Wood Fence Installation — cedar privacy, horizontal slat, board-on-board, picket, shadowbox
- Gate Installation — driveway, garden, privacy, and custom gate design
- Outdoor Living Spaces — multi-level decks, deck lighting, complete backyard design-build
